parsed_review.summary: CP00-816 (RP26.P07.M06.S01-RP26.P08.M02.S04, risk C, 150 units) is a clean descriptor-only synthetic-fixture/evidence-contract-bridge continuation of CP00-815, and its descriptor-verified production_ready claim is well-supported. Read-only verification (Read/Grep/Glob): (1) ENTERPRISE_SAAS_CP816_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:528) matches manifest/baseline/contract/plan: pack_id CP00-816, risk C, 150 units, range RP26.P07.M06.S01-RP26.P08.M02.S04, upstream CP00-815, next CP00-817/RP26.P08.M02.S05 (confirmed against plan CP00-817 first_unit RP26.P08.M02.S05), flag enterprise_saas_synthetic_fixture_evidence_contract_bridge_descriptor_verified. (2) ENTERPRISE_SAAS_CP816_REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:2407) deliverable_counts {failure_recovery:60, security_audit:10, implementation:25, hermes_evidence:33, fixture:5, test:11, claude_review:6}=150 and micro_title_row_counts sum 150 match the prompt distributions; I independently counted the baseline included_units and confirmed each deliverable total (claude_review 6, security_audit 10, fixture 5, test 11, hermes_evidence 33, implementation 25, failure_recovery 60). (3) required_section_rows definitions (FAILURE_RECOVERY_ROWS=20, +EDGE_HANDOFF=2, +CLOSEOUT_HANDOFF=10, HERMES_EVIDENCE_SCOPE_ROWS=10, HERMES_EVIDENCE_CONTRACT_ROWS=20, slice(0,4)) exactly match the live plan unit titles for all 8 sections (M06=22, M07=30, M08=22, M09=22, M10=20, P08.M00=10, P08.M01=20, P08.M02=4). (4) No-write/no-real-data enforced at multiple layers: ENTERPRISE_SAAS_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (registry.js:545) sets ~38 runtime/leak/write flags false; createCaseSet (service.js:308) hard-codes descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, and excludes raw/tenant/sso/scim/secret payloads; freezeResult (service.js:73) spreads the attestation; validateDescriptor (validators.js:194-256) rejects any runtime/identity-runtime/cross-tenant/secret/permission-eval/audit-write/UI-API/real-data/enterprise-trust flag. (5) authority_boundary (service.js:1997) sets claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; claude_packet read_only=true; createEnterpriseSaasCp816ClaudeReviewPacket (service.js:3087) promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false. (6) Hermes is used only for a descriptor-only evidence packet (receipt_shape descriptor_only_enterprise_saas_no_write, emits_runtime_receipt=false tested at model.test.js:1242), not product runtime (manifest/authority hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false). (7) Contract (enterprise-saas-hardening-contract.json) current_pack/latest_pack=CP00-816 (lines 54,70), latest_projection.descriptor=EnterpriseSaasCp816SyntheticFixtureEvidenceContractBridgeDescriptor (39922), validation.valid=true/errors=[] (50996), CP00-815 moved to historical_packs (520); validateEnterpriseSaasHardeningContract (validators.js:897) asserts all of this. (8) Tests (model.test.js:1214-1286) read the live plan/contract (not mocks) and assert empty coverage/descriptor/contract errors, rows.length=150, source_descriptor chain to CP00-815, authority boundary, hermes/claude read-only and non-final-approval, handoff to CP00-817, and 29 historical projections. (9) validate-rp26 script bound to CP816 with manifest-snapshot fallback and exits non-zero on any error. (10) CP178+ review-evidence hardening satisfied: forbidden_review_evidence (registry.js:1012) encodes not_logged_in/malformed_json/usage_limit_error/permission_denial/write_tool_used/runtime_receipt_claim; auth preflight passed (readiness-report exit 0, 1455-byte valid JSON); manifest pack_level_claude_review.valid_review_receipts=[] and invalid_review_attempts=[] (no malformed prior evidence). (11) Manifest production_ready=false/runtime_ready=false/status=in_progress with descriptor-only implementation_summary (descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true) — no runtime/enterprise-trust overclaim (grep for any true runtime/trust/write flag returned none); README cp00-816 entry consistent. (12) changed-file-scope active refs match manifest implementation_refs; progress-control-room, workbook, docx, ldip invalid-attempt, and new-session-handoff files correctly preserved as unrelated and active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted=[] so nothing in-scope is hidden. Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer, not final approver; that human/enterprise-trust authority boundary is expected and outside this receipt, so it does not block this CP closeout goal. Pre-closeout absence of command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json is expected (generated at/after this review, per the CP00-815 precedent). No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
